base_size.note: Full screen canvas, individual elements vary

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet game where player cares for Echo the cockatiel
context.role: Decorative water container, non-interactive environmental detail
context.screen_position: Lower left at x=40px, y=100px (to the right of food bowl)
adjacent_elements: cage_food_bowl (to the left at x=16px, y=100px)
context.usage_scenario: Static decorative element that adds realism to cage environment. Always visible, always full. Not interactive in current game version. Provides visual balance with food bowl.

visual_specification.shape: Small bowl similar to food bowl but smaller. Oval opening at top (10-12px wide), narrower base (6-8px wide). Contains water represented by blue color.

animation.description: Static object, always shows full water state

visual_specification.details: Bowl rim: #AB5236, 1px thick. Water interior: #29ADFF filling bowl. Optional: 1-2 white pixels (#FFF1E8) on water surface as highlight to suggest liquid. Bowl is 12px wide, 10px tall. Positioned at x=40px, y=100px.

relationships.shared_with: Similar bowl shape to food bowl
relationships.differences_from: Unlike food bowl: smaller (12x10 vs 16x12), contains water (not seeds), non-interactive, no state changes. Unlike perch: on floor level, decorative only.
